X-Frame-Options.recommendation: Set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent clickjacking attacks.

Content-Security-Policy.recommendation: Implement a CSP to mitigate XSS and data injection attacks.

X-Content-Type-Options.recommendation: Set to nosniff to prevent MIME type sniffing.

Strict-Transport-Security.recommendation: Enable HSTS to enforce HTTPS connections.

Referrer-Policy.recommendation: Set a Referrer-Policy to control referrer information leakage.

X-XSS-Protection.recommendation: Deprecated. Use CSP instead. If set, use "1; mode=block".
